name: Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed. Beat in egg.
3. Combine pumpkin and milk in a small bowl. Add dry ingredients alternately with the pumpkin mixture to the creamed mixture, stirring well after each addition.
4. Spoon batter into paper-lined 2 1/2-inch muffin-pan cups, filling them 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jam.
